definition_en: To send a private message or direct message to someone online, often to initiate a conversation or share information privately.
definition_ko: 온라인에서 누군가에게 비공개 메시지 또는 다이렉트 메시지를 보내는 것, 주로 대화를 시작하거나 정보를 공유할 때 사용한다.
example_en: Dm me and rate mine

definition_en: A short, looping animated image used to express reactions, emotions, or humor online.
definition_ko: 반복 재생되는 짧은 애니메이션 이미지로, 온라인에서 감정이나 반응, 유머를 표현할 때 사용한다.
example_en: ![gif](giphy|1236TCtX5dsGEo)

definition_en: Used to indicate amusement, sarcasm, or lightheartedness in online conversations, often to soften a statement or show humor.
definition_ko: 온라인 대화에서 웃기거나, 풍자하거나, 가볍게 웃음을 나타낼 때 쓰는 표현이다.
example_en: Lol. Its the coach has lost the players story arc.

definition_en: A casual term used to refer to a friend, buddy, or sometimes a person in a familiar or informal manner, often expressing camaraderie or emphasis.
definition_ko: 친구나 동료를 친근하게 부를 때 쓰는 말로, 우정을 나타내거나 강조할 때 사용한다.
example_en: Happy for you bro, but even though it's not likely I really, really feel he should seperate from this demon.

definition_en: Used to describe someone or something as physically attractive, appealing, or sexually desirable.
definition_ko: 외모나 매력, 성적 매력을 갖춘 사람이나 사물을 가리킬 때 쓰는 표현이다.
example_en: its so hot watching u stroke

definition_en: An acronym for 'laughing my ass off,' used to express amusement or that something is very funny, often in online conversations.
definition_ko: 아주 웃기거나 재밌는 상황에 대해 온라인에서 크게 웃음을 표현하는 말이다.
example_en:
did they see the mistake in the Kaelon guide and just decide umm never mind we're not going to include classes in these "guides" anymore?? lmao

this is already coming out two weeks after she did... surely it can't be this hard guys... 

she's a support for anyone wondering

definition_en: In slang, 'bad' describes something that is impressive, cool, or formidable, often used to praise or emphasize a high level of quality or impact.
definition_ko: 멋지고 인상적이거나 강렬한 것을 칭찬하거나 강조할 때 쓰는 표현이다.
example_en: Kartik watch out. U follow a Paki fanpage. U talk to her also. She shows off your texts in story. How bad you look.

definition_en: "Kinda" is an informal way of saying "kind of" or "somewhat," used to soften statements or indicate approximation in casual speech or writing.
definition_ko: ‘kind of’의 줄임말로, 말을 부드럽게 하거나 대략적임을 나타낼 때 사용한다.
example_en: I just watched it last night! It’s pretty cute, it’s kinda of an indie version of a road trip buddy comedy, mostly with the two male characters. I liked I but I enjoy stuff like that. Maya isn’t in it much at all but it was good to see her on my screen.

definition_en: Oh My God; exclamation of surprise, shock, excitement, or disbelief
definition_ko: 놀라움이나 충격, 흥분을 표현하는 감탄사이다.
example_en: Omg same to youuu☺️

definition_en: Used to emphasize that something is true or real, often in a way that exaggerates or stresses the statement, even when not literally factual.
definition_ko: 무언가가 사실임을 강조하거나 과장해서 말할 때 사용하는 표현.
example_en:
Brother trust me you don't wanna see that shit (literally). Dude is unhinged and honestly a model for those that astrosurf this sub atp.

But if you look around with poop in the search you should be able to find it.

definition_en: Used to emphasize the degree or extent of something, often meaning 'very' or 'extremely,' or to express disbelief or exaggeration.
definition_ko: 무언가의 정도나 심각성을 강조하거나 과장할 때 쓰는 표현.
example_en: Why would you want to? No matter what you do it's going to look way worse

definition_en: Used to describe something extraordinary, intense, or unpredictable, often implying it is impressive, extreme, or chaotic.
definition_ko: 놀랍거나 강렬하거나 예측 불가능한 것을 묘사하는 표현.

definition_en: What the fuck; an exclamation of shock, disbelief, or frustration
definition_ko: 충격이나 실망, 당혹감을 표현하는 욕설 약어.

definition_en: As fuck; used as a slang intensifier (e.g., 'tired af', 'cute af')

example_en: 🥰😘🙏 simply fine af! I’m in lust!

definition_en: A term used as a term of endearment or dominance in sexual or affectionate contexts, often implying a submissive or playful dynamic.

definition_en: Not safe for work; content containing adult, graphic, or inappropriate material

definition_en: A casual term for a person, often used to refer to a man or person in an informal, friendly, or sometimes dismissive manner.
definition_ko: 친근하거나 비격식적으로 남성 또는 사람을 부를 때 쓰는 말.

definition_en: Not Gonna Lie; used before an honest or blunt admission

definition_en: Incredibly impressive, extreme, or wild; used to express amazement

definition_en: Used as a friendly or informal way to address someone, often implying camaraderie or emphasis in conversation.
definition_ko: 친근하거나 비격식적으로 누군가를 부를 때 쓰며, 우정을 나타낸다.

definition_en: Describes someone who is relaxed, easygoing, or calm, often used to compliment or describe a laid-back attitude.

definition_en: Used to describe something that looks impressive, cool, or excellent, or to express strong positive feelings about something.

definition_en: In slang, 'mommy' is used as a term of endearment or dominance in a sexual or BDSM context, often implying a nurturing, controlling, or authoritative role.

definition_en: Used to emphasize that something is completely or honestly the case, often implying no exaggeration or deception.
definition_ko: 거짓이나 과장이 없고 솔직한 상태를 강조할 때 쓰입니다.
example_en: Oh my god. This is a laughable salary for your expertise. In IT, we hire foreigners to keep the wages low but this is straight up criminal.

definition_en: A casual, shortened form of 'them' or 'those,' used in informal speech or writing to refer to people or objects.
definition_ko: 사람이나 사물을 가리키는 비격식적 축약형 'them' 또는 'those'의 줄임말이다.
example_en: F yeah!?  Are you even a Bears fan?  Gonna sweep em this year.

definition_en: Used to describe something as the highest point, most intense, or most impressive, often in a humorous or exaggerated way.

definition_en: Feeling extremely amused or overwhelmed, often to the point of being unable to respond, or describing something as very funny or impressive.

Well I’m dead at that point so 🤷‍♂️

Somebody most likely fucked your wife before you came around…
